    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Portfolio Tracker - Multi Broker</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.0/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
    <style>
    :root {
    --bg: #070c14;
    --bg2: #0d1420;
    --bg3: #131b2a;
    --bg4: #1a2436;
    --border: #1e2d42;
    --border2: #243348;
    --text: #e8edf5;
    --text2: #8a9ab5;
    --text3: #5a6a82;
    --green: #22c55e;
    --green2: #16a34a;
    --red: #ef4444;
    --red2: #dc2626;
    --blue: #3b82f6;
    --accent: #0ea5e9;
    --gold: #f59e0b;
    }
    * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
    html, body { height:100%; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text); font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif; font-size:14px; }
    /* UPLOAD SCREEN */
    #upload-screen {
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    min-height:100vh; gap:24px; padding:24px 16px;
    }
    .upload-logo { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin-bottom:8px; }
    .upload-logo-icon {
    width:48px; height:48px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a5f,#0ea5e9);
    border-radius:12px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:20px;
    }
    .upload-logo h1 { font-size:22px; font-weight:700; }
    .upload-logo p { font-size:13px; color:var(--text2); }
    .upload-boxes { display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:stretch; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; }
    .upload-box {
    width:320px; max-width:calc(100vw - 32px); background:var(--bg2); border:2px dashed var(--border2);
    border-radius:16px; padding:36px 28px; text-align:center;
    cursor:pointer; transition:border-color .2s, background .2s; position:relative;
    }
    .upload-box:hover { border-color:var(--accent); background:var(--bg3); }
    .upload-box.loaded { border-color:var(--green); border-style:solid; }
    .upload-box svg { width:36px; height:36px; stroke:var(--text3); margin-bottom:12px; }
    .upload-box h3 { font-size:15px; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:6px; }
    .upload-box p { font-size:12px; color:var(--text2); }
    .upload-box input { display:none; }
    .broker-badge {
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; margin-bottom:14px;
    padding:3px 10px; border-radius:20px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.04em;
    }
    .broker-badge.degiro { background:rgba(14,165,233,.12); color:var(--accent); border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.2); }
    .broker-badge.optima { background:rgba(245,158,11,.12); color:var(--gold); border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.2); }
    .upload-status {
    margin-top:10px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:var(--green); display:none;
    }
    .upload-divider-v {
    width:1px; background:var(--border); align-self:stretch; margin:8px 0;
    }
    @media (max-width: 700px) { .upload-divider-v { display:none; } }
    .upload-logo-icon { cursor:pointer; }
    .upload-divider { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; width:min(656px, calc(100vw - 32px)); color:var(--text3); font-size:12px; }
    .upload-divider::before, .upload-divider::after { content:""; flex:1; height:1px; background:var(--border); }
    .upload-actions { display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:center; }
    .btn-demo {
    background:var(--bg3); border:1px solid var(--border2); color:var(--text2);
    padding:10px 24px; border-radius:8px; cursor:pointer; font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;
    font-size:13px; font-weight:500; transition:all .2s;
    }
    .btn-demo:hover { background:var(--bg4); color:var(--text); border-color:var(--accent); }
    .btn-load-all {
    background:var(--accent); border:1px solid var(--accent); color:#fff;
    padding:10px 24px; border-radius:8px; cursor:pointer; font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;
    font-size:13px; font-weight:600; transition:all .2s; display:none;
    }
    .btn-load-all:hover { opacity:.85; }
    /* MAIN APP */
    #app { display:none; height:100vh; flex-direction:column; position:relative; }
    /* TOP BAR */
    .topbar {
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    padding:12px 20px; background:var(--bg2); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .topbar-left { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; }
    .topbar-logo {
    width:32px; height:32px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a5f,#0ea5e9);
    border-radius:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:14px;
    }
    .topbar-title h2 { font-size:15px; font-weight:700; }
    .topbar-title p { font-size:11px; color:var(--text2); }
    .topbar-badge {
    background:var(--bg3); border:1px solid var(--border2);
    padding:6px 12px; border-radius:8px; font-size:12px; color:var(--text2);
    display:flex; align-items:center;
    }
    /* STATS ROW */
    .stats-row {
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
    gap:0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .stat-card {
    padding:16px 20px; border-right:1px solid var(--border);
    background:var(--bg2);
    }
    .stat-card:last-child { border-right:none; }
    .stat-label { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text3); font-weight:600; margin-bottom:6px; }
    .stat-value { font-size:22px; font-weight:700; font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace; }
    .stat-sub { font-size:11px; color:var(--text2); margin-top:3px; }
    .pos { color:var(--green); }
    .neg { color:var(--red); }
    /* MAIN CONTENT */
    .main { display:flex; flex:1; overflow:hidden; }
    /* SIDEBAR */
    .sidebar {
    width:260px; flex-shrink:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    border-right:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--bg2);
    }
    .sidebar-header {
    padding:12px 16px; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--text3); font-weight:600; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .sidebar-list { flex:1; overflow-y:auto; padding:8px; }
    .sidebar-list::-webkit-scrollbar { width:4px; }
    .sidebar-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background:transparent; }
    .sidebar-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--border2); border-radius:2px; }
    .stock-card {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:10px 12px;
    border-radius:10px; cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s; margin-bottom:4px;
    border:1px solid transparent;
    }
    .stock-card:hover { background:var(--bg3); }
    .stock-card.active { background:var(--bg4); border-color:var(--border2); }
    .stock-avatar {
    width:36px; height:36px; border-radius:8px; background:var(--bg3);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-weight:700; color:var(--text2); flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .stock-card.active .stock-avatar { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a5f,#0ea5e9); color:#fff; }
    .stock-info { flex:1; min-width:0; }
    .stock-ticker { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); }
    .stock-meta { font-size:11px; color:var(--text3); margin-top:1px; }
    .stock-pnl { text-align:right; flex-shrink:0; }
    .stock-pnl-val { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace; }
    .stock-status { font-size:10px; color:var(--text3); margin-top:1px; }
    .sidebar-separator {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:8px 4px 4px;
    font-size:10px; letter-spacing:.07em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--text3); font-weight:600;
    }
    .sidebar-separator::after { content:""; flex:1; height:1px; background:var(--border); }
    .sidebar-controls {
    padding:8px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px;
    }
    .sidebar-search {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;
    background:var(--bg3); border:1px solid var(--border2); border-radius:8px; padding:6px 10px;
    }
    .sidebar-search input {
    flex:1; background:transparent; border:none; outline:none;
    color:var(--text); font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif; font-size:12px;
    }
    .sidebar-search input::placeholder { color:var(--text3); }
    .sidebar-search svg { width:13px; height:13px; stroke:var(--text3); flex-shrink:0; }
    .sort-btns { display:flex; gap:4px; }
    .sort-btn {
    flex:1; padding:4px 6px; border-radius:6px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600;
    cursor:pointer; background:transparent; border:1px solid var(--border2);
    color:var(--text3); transition:all .15s; font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif; text-align:center;
    }
    .sort-btn:hover { background:var(--bg3); color:var(--text2); }
    .sort-btn.active { background:var(--bg4); border-color:var(--accent); color:var(--accent); }
    .btn-upload {
    width:100%; padding:9px; background:var(--bg3); border:1px solid var(--border2);
    color:var(--text2); border-radius:8px; cursor:pointer; font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;
    font-size:12px; font-weight:500; transition:all .15s; text-align:center;
    }
    .btn-upload:hover { background:var(--bg4); color:var(--text); border-color:var(--accent); }
    /* DETAIL PANEL */
    .detail { flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; overflow:hidden; background:var(--bg); }
    /* DETAIL HEADER */
    .detail-header {
    padding:16px 20px; background:var(--bg2); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:space-between; flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .detail-header-left {}
    .detail-company-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .detail-avatar {
    min-width:40px; height:30px; padding:0 6px; border-radius:7px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a5f,#0ea5e9);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-weight:700; color:#fff; flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .detail-company-name { font-size:15px; font-weight:700; }
    .detail-ticker { font-size:12px; color:var(--text2); margin-top:2px; }
    .detail-price { font-size:28px; font-weight:800; font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace; margin-top:6px; }
    .detail-header-right { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-end; gap:8px; }
    .pct-badge {
    padding:6px 12px; border-radius:8px; font-size:14px; font-weight:700;
    font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px;
    }
    .pct-badge.pos { background:rgba(34,197,94,.15); color:var(--green); border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.2); }
    .pct-badge.neg { background:rgba(239,68,68,.15); color:var(--red); border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.2); }
    .avg-prices { display:flex; gap:20px; }
    .avg-item label { font-size:11px; color:var(--text3); display:block; }
    .avg-item span { font-size:13px; font-weight:600; font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace; }
    /* STATS BAR */
    .stock-stats {
    display:flex; gap:0; padding:12px 20px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    background:var(--bg2); flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .stock-stat { padding-right:28px; margin-right:28px; border-right:1px solid var(--border); }
    .stock-stat:last-child { border-right:none; margin-right:0; padding-right:0; }
    .stock-stat label { font-size:10px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; color:var(--text3); font-weight:600; display:block; margin-bottom:3px; }
    .stock-stat span { font-size:14px; font-weight:700; font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace; }
    /* TABS */
    .tabs { display:flex; gap:0; padding:0 20px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--bg2); flex-shrink:0; }
    .tab {
    padding:10px 16px; font-size:13px; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer;
    border-bottom:2px solid transparent; color:var(--text2); transition:all .15s; margin-bottom:-1px;
    }
    .tab:hover { color:var(--text); }
    .tab.active { color:var(--text); border-bottom-color:var(--accent); }
    /* CHART AREA */
    #chart-panel { flex:1; padding:16px 20px; overflow:hidden; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
    .chart-toolbar { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:10px; }
    .chart-wrap { flex:1; position:relative; min-height:0; }
    .chart-legend { display:flex; gap:16px; }
    .legend-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-size:12px; color:var(--text2); }
    .legend-dot { width:10px; height:10px; border-radius:50%; }
    .timeframe-btns { display:flex; gap:4px; }
    .tf-btn {
    padding:4px 12px; border-radius:6px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600;
    cursor:pointer; background:transparent; border:1px solid var(--border2);
    color:var(--text3); transition:all .15s; font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;
    }
    .tf-btn:hover { background:var(--bg3); color:var(--text2); }
    .tf-btn.active { background:var(--bg4); border-color:var(--accent); color:var(--accent); }
    canvas#priceChart { width:100% !important; height:100% !important; }
    /* TRANSACTIONS PANEL */
    #tx-panel { flex:1; overflow:hidden; display:none; flex-direction:column; }
    .tx-filters { display:flex; gap:6px; padding:12px 20px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--bg2); flex-shrink:0; }
    .tx-filter {
    padding:5px 14px; border-radius:6px; font-size:12px; font-weight:500;
    cursor:pointer; background:transparent; border:1px solid var(--border2);
    color:var(--text2); transition:all .15s; font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;
    }
    .tx-filter:hover { background:var(--bg3); color:var(--text); }
    .tx-filter.active { background:var(--accent); border-color:var(--accent); color:#fff; }
    .tx-table-wrap { flex:1; overflow-y:auto; padding:0 20px 16px; }
    .tx-table-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar { width:4px; }
    .tx-table-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--border2); border-radius:2px; }
    table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; margin-top:12px; }
    thead th {
    text-align:left; padding:8px 12px; font-size:10px; text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:.07em; color:var(--text3); font-weight:600; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    }
    tbody tr { border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); transition:background .1s; }
    tbody tr:hover { background:var(--bg3); }
    tbody td { padding:10px 12px; font-size:13px; }
    .type-badge {
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:4px;
    font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.04em;
    }
    .type-buy { background:rgba(34,197,94,.12); color:var(--green); }
    .type-sell { background:rgba(239,68,68,.12); color:var(--red); }
    .mono { font-family:"JetBrains Mono",monospace; font-size:12px; }
    /* MOBILE / ANDROID */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
    #app { height:auto; min-height:100dvh; overflow-y:auto; }
    .main { flex-direction:column; overflow:visible; }
    .sidebar {
    width:100%; border-right:none;
    border-bottom:3px solid var(--accent);
    max-height:320px;
    }
    .detail {
    overflow:visible;
    border-top:none; /* accent border on sidebar is enough */
    }
    .detail::before {
    content:"CHART & DETAILS";
    display:block;
    font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.1em;
    color:var(--text3); padding:10px 16px 0;
    }
    .stats-row { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    .stock-stats { flex-wrap:wrap; gap:12px; }
    .stock-stat { border-right:none; margin-right:0; padding-right:0; min-width:40%; }
    .detail-header { flex-direction:column; gap:10px; }
    .detail-header-right { align-items:flex-start; flex-direction:row; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .avg-prices { flex-wrap:wrap; gap:12px; }
    #chart-panel { overflow:visible; min-height:320px; }
    .chart-wrap { min-height:280px; }
    #tx-panel { overflow:visible; }
    .tx-table-wrap { overflow-x:auto; }
    }
    .no-data { text-align:center; padding:60px 20px; color:var(--text3); }
    .no-data svg { width:40px; height:40px; stroke:var(--text3); margin-bottom:12px; }
    /* LOADING OVERLAY */
    #loading-overlay {
    position:absolute; inset:0; background:rgba(7,12,20,.85);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    z-index:100; backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
    }
    .loading-inner { text-align:center; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:14px; }
    .loading-spinner {
    width:40px; height:40px; border:3px solid var(--border2);
    border-top-color:var(--accent); border-radius:50%;
    animation:spin .8s linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes spin { to { transform:rotate(360deg); } }
    .loading-text { font-size:15px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text); }
    .loading-sub { font-size:12px; color:var(--text3); }
    /* PRICE SOURCE BADGE */
    .price-source-badge { font-size:11px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.04em; }
    .price-source-badge.live { color:var(--green); }
    .price-source-badge.sim { color:var(--text3); }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- UPLOAD SCREEN -->
    <div id="upload-screen">
    <div class="upload-logo">
    <div class="upload-logo-icon">📈</div>
    <div>
    <h1>Portfolio Tracker</h1>
    <p>Multi Broker</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="upload-boxes">
    <div class="upload-box" id="box-degiro" onclick="document.getElementById('file-input').click()">
    <div class="broker-badge degiro">● DeGiro</div>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <polyline points="17,8 12,3 7,8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
    <h3>Upload DeGiro CSV Export</h3>
    <p>Drop your Transactions.csv here or click to browse</p>
    <div class="upload-status" id="status-degiro">✓ File loaded</div>
    <input type="file" id="file-input" accept=".csv" onchange="handleDeGiroUpload(event)">
    </div>
    <div class="upload-divider-v"></div>
    <div class="upload-box" id="box-optima" onclick="document.getElementById('file-input-optima').click()">
    <div class="broker-badge optima">● Optima Trader</div>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <polyline points="17,8 12,3 7,8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
    <h3>Upload Optima Trader Export</h3>
    <p>Drop your export file here or click to browse</p>
    <div class="upload-status" id="status-optima">✓ File loaded</div>
    <input type="file" id="file-input-optima" accept=".csv" onchange="handleOptimaUpload(event)">
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="upload-divider">or</div>
    <div class="upload-actions">
    <button class="btn-demo" onclick="loadDemo()">Load Demo Data</button>
    <button class="btn-load-all" id="btn-load-all" onclick="loadAllUploaded()">Load Portfolio →</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- MAIN APP -->
    <div id="app">
    <div class="topbar">
    <div class="topbar-left">
    <div class="topbar-logo" onclick="goHome()" title="Back to home" style="cursor:pointer;">📈</div>
    <div class="topbar-title">
    <h2>Portfolio Tracker</h2>
    <p>Multi Broker</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
    <button onclick="document.getElementById('file-input2').click()" style="
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;
    background:var(--bg3); border:1px solid var(--border2); color:var(--text2);
    padding:6px 12px; border-radius:8px; cursor:pointer;
    font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:500;
    transition:all .15s;
    " onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='var(--accent)';this.style.color='var(--text)'"
    onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='var(--border2)';this.style.color='var(--text2)'">
    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/>
    <polyline points="17,8 12,3 7,8"/>
    <line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/>
    </svg>
    CSV
    </button>
    <input type="file" id="file-input2" accept=".csv" style="display:none" onchange="handleFileUpload(event)">
    <div class="topbar-badge" id="stock-count">— stocks</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-row">
    <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-label">Total Invested</div>
    <div class="stat-value mono" id="total-invested">—</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-label">Realized P&amp;L</div>
    <div class="stat-value mono" id="total-pnl">—</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-label">Total Trades</div>
    <div class="stat-value" id="total-trades">—</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-label">Win Rate (Closed)</div>
    <div class="stat-value" id="win-rate-closed">—</div>
    <div class="stat-sub" id="win-rate-closed-sub"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="main">
    <div class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-controls">
    <div class="sidebar-search">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/>
    </svg>
    <input type="text" id="sidebar-search" placeholder="Search stocks…" oninput="renderSidebar()">
    </div>
    <div class="sort-btns">
    <button class="sort-btn active" id="sort-value" onclick="setSortMode('value')">By Value</button>
    <button class="sort-btn" id="sort-az" onclick="setSortMode('az')">A → Z</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sidebar-list" id="sidebar-list"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="detail" id="detail-panel">
    <div class="detail-header">
    <div class="detail-header-left">
    <div class="detail-company-row">
    <div class="detail-avatar" id="d-avatar">—</div>
    <div class="detail-company-name" id="d-name">—</div>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-ticker" id="d-ticker">—</div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;">
    <div class="detail-price" id="d-price">—</div>
    <span class="price-source-badge" id="d-price-source"></span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-header-right">
    <div class="pct-badge" id="d-pct-badge">—</div>
    <div class="avg-prices">
    <div class="avg-item">
    <label>Avg Buy</label>
    <span id="d-avg-buy">—</span>
    </div>
    <div class="avg-item">
    <label>Avg Sell</label>
    <span id="d-avg-sell">—</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="stock-stats">
    <div class="stock-stat"><label>Total Bought</label><span id="d-bought">—</span></div>
    <div class="stock-stat"><label>Total Sold</label><span id="d-sold">—</span></div>
    <div class="stock-stat"><label>Still Holding</label><span id="d-holding">—</span></div>
    <div class="stock-stat"><label>Realized P&amp;L</label><span id="d-rpnl">—</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="tabs">
    <div class="tab active" id="tab-chart" onclick="switchTab('chart')">Chart</div>
    <div class="tab" id="tab-tx" onclick="switchTab('tx')">Transactions</div>
    </div>
    <div id="chart-panel">
    <div class="chart-toolbar">
    <div class="chart-legend">
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:var(--green)"></div> Buy</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:var(--red)"></div> Sell</div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeframe-btns">
    <button class="tf-btn" onclick="setTimeframe('1M',this)">1M</button>
    <button class="tf-btn" onclick="setTimeframe('12M',this)">12M</button>
    <button class="tf-btn active" onclick="setTimeframe('YTD',this)">YTD</button>
    <button class="tf-btn" onclick="setTimeframe('ALL',this)">ALL</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="chart-wrap">
    <canvas id="priceChart"></canvas>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="tx-panel">
    <div class="tx-filters">
    <button class="tx-filter active" onclick="setTxFilter('all',this)">All Transactions</button>
    <button class="tx-filter" onclick="setTxFilter('buy',this)">Buys</button>
    <button class="tx-filter" onclick="setTxFilter('sell',this)">Sells</button>
    </div>
    <div class="tx-table-wrap">
    <table>
    <thead>
    <tr>
    <th>Date</th>
    <th>Type</th>
    <th>Shares</th>
    <th>Price</th>
    <th>Total</th>
    </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody id="tx-tbody"></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <script>
    const DEMO_CSV = `Date,Time,Product,ISIN,Reference exchange,Venue,Quantity,Price,,Local value,,Value GBP,Exchange rate,AutoFX Fee,Transaction and/or third party fees GBP,Total GBP,Order ID,
    18-03-2026,16:40,AURORA INNOVATION INC CLASS A,US0517741072,NDQ,CDED,30,4.0850,USD,-122.55,USD,-91.96,1.3327,-0.23,-1.73,-93.92,,3a74f636-8e93-4ab0-92d9-dd31081be368
    17-03-2026,14:45,BLINK CHARGING CO,US09354A1007,NDQ,SOHO,50,0.6166,USD,-30.83,USD,-23.10,1.3349,-0.06,-1.73,-24.88,,b18d431c-79b2-44ee-8442-95e2629d73ee
    17-03-2026,14:44,SOLID POWER INC CLASS A,US83422N1054,NDQ,CDED,20,3.2650,USD,-65.30,USD,-48.91,1.3350,-0.12,-1.73,-50.77,,3f6b8920-5d9c-4eac-a387-84d33ae79831
    16-03-2026,15:36,QUANTUMSCAPE CORP CLASS A,US74767V1098,NDQ,JNST,60,6.8650,USD,-411.90,USD,-309.66,1.3302,-0.77,-1.73,-312.17,,67df8204-9b5a-42fb-910d-e8d2ef85128b
    12-03-2026,14:30,ADR ON NOVO NORDISK A/S,US6701002056,NSY,XNYS,25,38.7400,USD,-968.50,USD,-723.78,1.3381,-1.81,-1.73,-727.32,,06231998-139a-4b9d-a84d-4794c8ef70fb
    12-03-2026,14:30,VISTRA CORP,US92840M1027,NSY,XNYS,5,157.0800,USD,-785.40,USD,-586.94,1.3381,-1.47,-1.73,-590.14,,75759f2d-67c6-4cd8-b5e3-35e9b8db2094
    12-03-2026,14:30,AURORA INNOVATION INC CLASS A,US0517741072,NDQ,XNAS,100,4.3800,USD,-438.00,USD,-327.33,1.3381,-0.82,-1.73,-329.87,,35546b50-3c1d-40c0-b7ef-05c4be95d2
    05-02-2025,09:08,SYNAIRGEN - NON TRADEABLE,GB00BRCCMJ59,DEG,,-14,0.0000,GBX,0.00,GBX,0.00,100.0000,0.00,,0.00,`;
    const TICKER_MAP = {
    // Athens
    "GEK TERNA SA": "GEKTERNA",
    "PUBLIC POWER CORPORATION SA": "PPC",
    "NATIONAL BANK OF GREECE SA": "ETE",
    "METLEN ENERGY & METALS PLC": "METLEN",
    "METLEN ENERGY & METALS PLC": "METLEN",
    "HELLENIQ ENERGY HOLDINGS SA": "HELLENIQ",
    "ATHENS INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT SA": "AIA",
    "LAMDA DEVELOPMENT SA": "LAMDA",
    "AUSTRIACARD HOLDINGS AG": "ACAG",
    "TITAN SA": "TITK",
    "CREDIABANK SA": "CRED",
    "AUTOHELLAS SA": "OTOEL",
    "OPTIMA BANK SA": "OPTIMA",
    "AEGEAN AIRLINES SA": "AEGN",
    "ALLWYN AG": "OPAP",
    "TITAN SA": "ΤΙΤΚ",
    "BANK OF CYPRUS HOLDINGS PLC": "BOCHGR",
    // US stocks
    "AURORA INNOVATION INC CLASS A": "AUR",
    "BLINK CHARGING CO": "BLNK",
    "SOLID POWER INC CLASS A": "SLDP",
    "QUANTUMSCAPE CORP CLASS A": "QS",
    "ADR ON NOVO NORDISK A/S": "NVO",
    "VISTRA CORP": "VST",
    "WESTERN DIGITAL CORP": "WDC",
    "TAKE-TWO INTERACTIVE SOFTWARE INC": "TTWO",
    "DOCUSIGN INC": "DOCU",
    "NETFLIX INC": "NFLX",
    "MONDELEZ INTERNATIONAL INC CLASS A": "MDLZ",
    "SPORTRADAR GROUP AG CLASS A": "SRAD",
    "MICRON TECHNOLOGY INC": "MU",
    "ROCKET LAB CORP": "RKLB",
    "ANGLOGOLD ASHANTI PLC": "AU",
    "COEUR MINING, INC": "CDE",
    "VERTIV HOLDINGS CO CLASS A": "VRT",
    "PEPSICO INC": "PEP",
    "LENZ THERAPEUTICS INC": "LENZ",
    "ADR ON GSK PLC": "GSK",
    "EGAIN CORP": "EGAN",
    "APPLIED DIGITAL CORP": "APLD",
    "BIRKENSTOCK HOLDING PLC": "BIRK",
    "ELDORADO GOLD CORP": "EGO",
    "NISOURCE INC": "NI",
    "SALESFORCE INC": "CRM",
    "ORGANOGENESIS HOLDINGS INC CLASS A": "ORGO",
    "NATIONAL AMERICAN UNIV": "NAUH",
    // LSE
    "BREEDON GROUP PLC": "BREE",
    "VANGUARD S&P 500 UCITS ETF USD DIS": "VUSA",
    "PLUS500 LTD": "PLUS",
    "ASTRAZENECA PLC": "AZN",
    "GSK PLC": "GSK",
    "SYNAIRGEN": "SNG",
    "SYNAIRGEN - NON TRADEABLE": "SNG",
    // Frankfurt / HK
    "FRESENIUS SE & CO KGAA": "FRE",
    "POP MART INTERNATIONAL GROUP LTD": "9992",
    };
    let allTrades = [];
    let stockMap = {};
    let stockNames = [];
    let selectedStock = null;
    let currentTab = "chart";
    let txFilter = "all";
    let priceChart = null;
    let currentTimeframe = "YTD";
    let sortMode = "value"; // "value" | "az"
    let workingProxyIdx = null; // remembers fastest proxy
    let fetchCallCount = 0; // rotates starting proxy per fetch
    const priceCache = {}; // name → {dates, closes}
    // Currency & number-format state (set per CSV upload, merged for portfolio)
    let portfolioCurrency = "EUR"; // dominant currency shown in aggregate stats
    function detectCSVFormat(text) {
    // Returns { numFormat: "EU"|"UK" }
    // Currency is now read per-row (col 8) since a single CSV can mix GBP, GBX, EUR
    const lines = text.split("\n").filter(l => l.trim());
    // Infer numFormat from currency column first
    for (let i = 1; i < Math.min(6, lines.length); i++) {
    const row = parseCSVRow(lines[i]);
    if (row.length > 8) {
    const curr = (row[8] || "").replace(/"/g,"").trim().toUpperCase();
    if (curr === "GBP" || curr === "GBX") return { numFormat: "UK" };
    if (curr === "EUR") return { numFormat: "EU" };
    }
    }
    // Fallback: infer from number shape in price column (col 7)
    for (let i = 1; i < Math.min(6, lines.length); i++) {
    const row = parseCSVRow(lines[i]);
    if (row.length > 7) {
    const s = (row[7] || "").replace(/"/g,"").trim();
    const lastDot = s.lastIndexOf(".");
    const lastComma = s.lastIndexOf(",");
    if (lastDot > lastComma && lastDot !== -1) return { numFormat: "UK" };
    if (lastComma > lastDot && lastComma !== -1) return { numFormat: "EU" };
    }
    }
    return { numFormat: "EU" };
    }
    function parseNum(s, numFormat) {
    if (!s) return 0;
    s = s.replace(/"/g,"").trim();
    if ((numFormat || "EU") === "UK") {
    // British: 1,250.50 → remove thousands commas, dot is decimal
    s = s.replace(/,/g,"");
    } else {
    // European: 1.250,50 → remove thousands dots, comma is decimal
    s = s.replace(/\./g,"").replace(",",".");
    }
    return parseFloat(s) || 0;
    }
    function currencySymbol(currency) {
    const c = (currency || portfolioCurrency || "").toUpperCase();
    if (c === "GBP" || c === "GBX") return "£";
    if (c === "USD") return "$";
    if (c === "EUR") return "€";
    if (c === "JPY") return "¥";
    if (c === "CHF") return "CHF ";
    if (c === "CAD") return "CA$";
    if (c === "AUD") return "A$";
    return c ? c + " " : "€"; // fallback: show code
    }
    function currencyLocale(currency) {
    const c = (currency || portfolioCurrency || "").toUpperCase();
    return (c === "GBP" || c === "GBX") ? "en-GB" : "de-DE";
    }
    function fmtMoney(v, currency, sign=true) {
    const sym = currencySymbol(currency);
    const abs = Math.abs(v).toLocaleString(currencyLocale(currency), {minimumFractionDigits:2, maximumFractionDigits:2});
    if (!sign) return sym + abs;
    return (v >= 0 ? "+" : "-") + sym + abs;
    }
    function fmtMoneyPlain(v, currency) {
    const sym = currencySymbol(currency);
    return sym + Math.abs(v).toLocaleString(currencyLocale(currency), {minimumFractionDigits:2, maximumFractionDigits:2});
    }
    // Legacy aliases (used in places that don't need per-trade currency)
    function fmtEur(v, sign=true) { return fmtMoney(v, portfolioCurrency, sign); }
    function fmtEurPlain(v) { return fmtMoneyPlain(v, portfolioCurrency); }
    function parseDate(s) {
    // Support dd-mm-yyyy and yyyy-mm-dd
    const parts = s.split("-");
    if (parts.length !== 3) return null;
    if (parts[0].length === 4) {
    // yyyy-mm-dd
    return new Date(+parts[0], +parts[1]-1, +parts[2]);
    }
    // dd-mm-yyyy
    return new Date(+parts[2], +parts[1]-1, +parts[0]);
    }
    function normaliseDateStr(s) {
    // Normalise any supported format to dd-mm-yyyy for internal use
    const parts = s.split("-");
    if (parts.length !== 3) return s;
    if (parts[0].length === 4) return `${parts[2]}-${parts[1]}-${parts[0]}`;
    return s;
    }
    function fmtDate(dt) {
    return dt.toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"2-digit",month:"short",year:"numeric"});
    }
    function fmtPct(v) {
    return (v >= 0 ? "+" : "") + v.toFixed(2) + "%";
    }
    function avatar(name) {
    return (TICKER_MAP[name] || name.split(" ")[0]).toUpperCase().substring(0, 4);
    }
    function avatarFontSize(ticker) {
    const len = ticker.length;
    if (len <= 2) return "13px";
    if (len === 3) return "11px";
    return "9px";
    }
    function parseCSV(text) {
    const { numFormat } = detectCSVFormat(text);
    const lines = text.split("\n").filter(l => l.trim());
    const trades = [];
    // Detect account base currency from header row (col 11: "Value GBP" / "Value EUR")
    const headerRow = parseCSVRow(lines[0]);
    const col11Header = (headerRow[11] || "").replace(/"/g,"").trim().toUpperCase();
    const col15Header = (headerRow[15] || "").replace(/"/g,"").trim().toUpperCase();
    let accountCurrency = "GBP"; // default
    if (col11Header.includes("EUR") || col15Header.includes("EUR")) accountCurrency = "EUR";
    else if (col11Header.includes("GBP") || col15Header.includes("GBP")) accountCurrency = "GBP";
    for (let i = 1; i < lines.length; i++) {
    const row = parseCSVRow(lines[i]);
    if (row.length < 16) continue;
    const rawDate = row[0].trim();
    if (!rawDate || !rawDate.match(/^\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{4}$|^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/)) continue;
    const dateStr = normaliseDateStr(rawDate);
    const dt = parseDate(rawDate);
    if (!dt || isNaN(dt.getTime())) continue;
    const localCurr = (row[8] || "").replace(/"/g,"").trim().toUpperCase();
    const isGBX = localCurr === "GBX";
    const sharesRaw = parseNum(row[6], numFormat);
    const totalRaw = parseNum(row[15], numFormat); // always in account base currency
    // Derive price in account base currency from col 11 (base-currency value) ÷ shares
    // This ensures USD/EUR/GBX stocks all show prices in GBP (or EUR for EUR accounts)
    const baseValue = parseNum(row[11], numFormat); // e.g. "Value GBP"
    let priceRaw;
    if (sharesRaw !== 0 && baseValue !== 0) {
    priceRaw = Math.abs(baseValue) / Math.abs(sharesRaw);
    } else {
    // Fallback: use col 7 price, converting GBX→GBP if needed
    priceRaw = parseNum(row[7], numFormat);
    if (isGBX) priceRaw = priceRaw / 100;
    }
    if (!priceRaw) continue;
    // Also store original local price (col 7) and local currency for display in chart/tx
    let localPriceRaw = parseNum(row[7], numFormat);
    if (isGBX) localPriceRaw = localPriceRaw / 100;
    const displayCurrency = isGBX ? "GBP" : (localCurr || accountCurrency);
    trades.push({
    dateStr,
    date: dt,
    product: row[2].trim(),
    exchange: row[4].trim(), // col 4 = Reference exchange (NSY, NDQ, LSE…), not col 5 venue (CDED etc.)
    shares: sharesRaw,
    price: priceRaw, // account-currency price (for P&L)
    localPrice: localPriceRaw, // native currency price (for display)
    localCurrency: displayCurrency, // native currency (USD, EUR, GBP…)
    totalEur: totalRaw,
    currency: accountCurrency,
    isBuy: sharesRaw > 0
    });
    }
    return trades;
    }
    function parseCSVRow(line) {
    const result = [];
    let cur = "", inQ = false;
    for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i++) {
    const c = line[i];
    if (c === "\"" ) { inQ = !inQ; }
    else if (c === "," && !inQ) { result.push(cur); cur = ""; }
    else { cur += c; }
    }
    result.push(cur);
    return result;
    }
    function calcPnL(trades) {
    const sorted = [...trades].sort((a,b) => a.date - b.date);
    let lots = [];
    let realized = 0;
    let totalBought = 0, totalSold = 0, totalBoughtEur = 0, totalSoldEur = 0;
    for (const t of sorted) {
    if (t.isBuy) {
    totalBought += t.shares;
    totalBoughtEur += t.shares * t.price;
    } else {
    totalSold += Math.abs(t.shares);
    totalSoldEur += Math.abs(t.shares) * t.price;
    }
    }
    lots = []; realized = 0;
    for (const t of sorted) {
    if (t.isBuy) {
    lots.push({shares: t.shares, price: t.price});
    } else {
    let toSell = Math.abs(t.shares);
    let remaining = toSell;
    let costBasis = 0;
    const tmpLots = lots.map(l => ({...l}));
    while (remaining > 0 && tmpLots.length > 0) {
    const lot = tmpLots[0];
    const used = Math.min(lot.shares, remaining);
    costBasis += used * lot.price;
    lot.shares -= used;
    remaining -= used;
    if (lot.shares <= 0) tmpLots.shift();
    }
    const matched = toSell - remaining;
    realized += t.price * matched - costBasis;
    let r2 = toSell;
    while (r2 > 0 && lots.length > 0) {
    const used = Math.min(lots[0].shares, r2);
    lots[0].shares -= used;
    r2 -= used;
    if (lots[0].shares <= 0) lots.shift();
    }
    }
    }
    const holding = Math.round(totalBought - totalSold);
    const avgBuy = totalBought ? totalBoughtEur / totalBought : 0;
    const avgSell = totalSold ? totalSoldEur / totalSold : 0;
    return { realized, totalBought, totalSold, totalBoughtEur, holding, avgBuy, avgSell };
    }
    // ── Synthetic fallback (used if Yahoo Finance fetch fails) ────────────────
    function generatePricesSynthetic(trades) {
    const sorted = [...trades].sort((a,b) => a.date - b.date);
    if (!sorted.length) return {dates:[], closes:[], yfCurrency: null};
    const start = new Date(2019,0,1);
    const end = new Date();
    // Use localPrice (native currency) so synthetic chart shows USD/EUR etc. not GBP-converted
    const localCurr = sorted[0].localCurrency || sorted[0].currency || null;
    const anchors = {};
    for (const t of sorted) {
    if (!anchors[t.dateStr]) anchors[t.dateStr] = [];
    anchors[t.dateStr].push(t.localPrice || t.price);
    }
    const anchorAvg = {};
    for (const [k,ps] of Object.entries(anchors))
    anchorAvg[k] = ps.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/ps.length;
    const allDates = [];
    const cur = new Date(start);
    while (cur <= end) {
    if (cur.getDay() !== 0 && cur.getDay() !== 6) allDates.push(new Date(cur));
    cur.setDate(cur.getDate()+1);
    }
    if (!allDates.length) return {dates:[],closes:[], yfCurrency: localCurr};
    const anchorKeys = Object.keys(anchorAvg).map(k=>({k,d:parseDate(k)})).sort((a,b)=>a.d-b.d);
    if (!anchorKeys.length) return {dates:[],closes:[], yfCurrency: localCurr};
    const firstPrice = anchorAvg[anchorKeys[0].k];
    const seed = sorted[0].product.split("").reduce((a,c)=>a+c.charCodeAt(0),0);
    let rng = seed;
    const rand = () => { rng=(rng*1664525+1013904223)&0xffffffff; return (rng>>>0)/0xffffffff; };
    const randn = () => (rand()+rand()+rand()-1.5)*0.8;
    const anchorByDateStr = {};
    for (const ak of anchorKeys) anchorByDateStr[ak.k] = anchorAvg[ak.k];
    const dateStrFmt = d => {
    const dd=String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,"0"), mm=String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0"), yyyy=d.getFullYear();
    return `${dd}-${mm}-${yyyy}`;
    };
    const closes = [];
    let price = firstPrice;
    for (let i = 0; i < allDates.length; i++) {
    const ds = dateStrFmt(allDates[i]);
    price = anchorByDateStr[ds] !== undefined
    ? anchorByDateStr[ds] * (1 + randn()*0.003)
    : price * Math.exp(0.0002 + 0.008 * randn());
    closes.push(Math.max(price*0.5, price));
    }
    return { dates: allDates, closes, yfCurrency: localCurr };
    }
    // ── Yahoo Finance via CORS proxy ─────────────────────────────────────────
    const YF_MAP = {
    // US stocks
    "AURORA INNOVATION INC CLASS A": "AUR",
    "BLINK CHARGING CO": "BLNK",
    "SOLID POWER INC CLASS A": "SLDP",
    "QUANTUMSCAPE CORP CLASS A": "QS",
    "ADR ON NOVO NORDISK A/S": "NVO",
    "VISTRA CORP": "VST",
    "WESTERN DIGITAL CORP": "WDC",
    "TAKE-TWO INTERACTIVE SOFTWARE INC": "TTWO",
    "DOCUSIGN INC": "DOCU",
    "NETFLIX INC": "NFLX",
    "MONDELEZ INTERNATIONAL INC CLASS A": "MDLZ",
    "SPORTRADAR GROUP AG CLASS A": "SRAD",
    "MICRON TECHNOLOGY INC": "MU",
    "ROCKET LAB CORP": "RKLB",
    "ANGLOGOLD ASHANTI PLC": "AU",
    "COEUR MINING, INC": "CDE",
    "VERTIV HOLDINGS CO CLASS A": "VRT",
    "PEPSICO INC": "PEP",
    "LENZ THERAPEUTICS INC": "LENZ",
    "ADR ON GSK PLC": "GSK",
    "EGAIN CORP": "EGAN",
    "APPLIED DIGITAL CORP": "APLD",
    "BIRKENSTOCK HOLDING PLC": "BIRK",
    "ELDORADO GOLD CORP": "EGO",
    "NISOURCE INC": "NI",
    "SALESFORCE INC": "CRM",
    "ORGANOGENESIS HOLDINGS INC CLASS A": "ORGO",
    // LSE (Yahoo uses .L suffix)
    "BREEDON GROUP PLC": "BREE.L",
    "VANGUARD S&P 500 UCITS ETF USD DIS": "VUSA.L",
    "PLUS500 LTD": "PLUS.L",
    "ASTRAZENECA PLC": "AZN.L",
    "GSK PLC": "GSK.L",
    "SYNAIRGEN": "SNG.L",
    // Frankfurt
    "FRESENIUS SE & CO KGAA": "FRE.DE",
    "POP MART INTERNATIONAL GROUP LTD": "9992.HK",
    // Athens
    "METLEN ENERGY & METALS PLC": "METLEN.AT",
    "AEGEAN AIRLINES SA": "AEGN.AT",
    "GEK TERNA SA": "GEKTERNA.AT",
    "PUBLIC POWER CORPORATION SA": "PPC.AT",
    "NATIONAL BANK OF GREECE SA": "ETE.AT",
    "OPAP HOLDING SA": "OPAP.AT",
    "HELLENIQ ENERGY HOLDINGS SA": "ELPE.AT",
    "ATHENS INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT SA": "AIA.AT",
    "LAMDA DEVELOPMENT SA": "LAMDA.AT",
    "AUSTRIACARD HOLDINGS AG": "ACAG.AT",
    "TITAN SA": "TITK.AT",
    "CREDIABANK SA": "CRED.AT",
    "AUTOHELLAS SA": "OTOEL.AT",
    "OPTIMA BANK SA": "OPTIMA.AT",
    };
    async function fetchPrices(name) {
    if (priceCache[name]) return priceCache[name];
    const yfSymbol = YF_MAP[name];
    if (!yfSymbol) {
    const result = generatePricesSynthetic(stockMap[name]);
    priceCache[name] = { ...result, source: "synthetic" };
    return priceCache[name];
    }
    const yfUrl = `https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/${encodeURIComponent(yfSymbol)}?interval=1d&range=10y`;
    // Public CORS proxies — tried in order until one succeeds.
    // (Netlify _redirects proxy no longer used: GitHub Pages is a static host
    // and cannot process server-side redirect/proxy rules.)
    const CORS_PROXIES = [
    url => `https://corsproxy.io/?${encodeURIComponent(url)}`,
    url => `https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=${encodeURIComponent(url)}`,
    url => `https://proxy.cors.sh/${url}`,
    ];
    function tryProxy(url) {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const timer = setTimeout(() => reject(new Error("Timeout")), 8000);
    fetch(url)
    .then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + r.status); return r.json(); })
    .then(json => {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    const result = json?.chart?.result?.[0];
    View remainder of file in raw view
